summary: OpenNori now lets users request Chinese or English Contract presentation in natural language. Generated brainstorm, discovery, draft, report next candidates, and context/status surfaces preserve presentation.language for human-readable text; Skills document the natural-language mapping; legacy/current contracts keep their existing presentation during ordinary evidence/status/report/check writes and change only after explicit user approval with --no-from-draft --language.

sources.label: npm run check (118 tests passed; doctor ready)
sources.command: npm run check (118 tests passed; doctor ready)

sources.label: language smoke: brainstorm/discover zh-CN and draft en
sources.command: language smoke: brainstorm/discover zh-CN and draft en

sources.label: legacy smoke: evidence write keeps Language: en; approve --no-from-draft --language zh-CN switches to 语言: zh-CN
sources.command: legacy smoke: evidence write keeps Language: en; approve --no-from-draft --language zh-CN switches to 语言: zh-CN

reviewability: Rerun npm run check, inspect language tests and Skill/README/website text, then run the smoke commands for zh-CN/en generation and legacy current-contract approval.
limitations: This verifies deterministic OpenNori surfaces and local website text; changing existing contract wording still requires the agent/user to revise visible prose, not an automatic translation adapter.
